_meta.purpose: Curated shortlist (15 venues) for the app, selected from data/venues-raw.json for geographic coverage + intent-tier variety. Selection is a judgment call, not just top-N by score — see selection_notes.
corrections_made_during_curation: PVR Superplex is a shared sub-brand at TWO distinct Noida malls: Mall of India (Sector 18, IMAX-equipped) and Logix City Centre (Sector 32, no IMAX tag). Earlier project research had conflated these. Logix was also missing from the Tier E list in VENUE-SCORING.md/venues-raw.json - added here as venue #16 equivalent context, not selected for the shortlist.
known_coverage_gaps: No Faridabad venue appeared in any of the three district.in listings scraped - Faridabad localities will have no good nearby recommendation. Real gap, not an oversight to silently paper over.
Connaught Place (Central Delhi) has zero premium-tagged screens (INOX Odeon, PVR Plaza both Tier E) - Central Delhi localities route to Priya/Saket/Nehru Place instead, all a real trip away.
_meta.coordinates_status: PENDING for all venues except where noted 'coords_verified' - hand-verification required before data entry, per the lesson from the DLF Phase 2 experiment (free geocoder unreliable on venue-level queries). Delegated to build-phase task.

shortlist.name: PVR IMAX with Laser - Priya
shortlist.editorial_verdict: The best screen in North India for this film, and the only one we're certain is laser.
shortlist.selection_reason: Anchor venue for The Full Epic intent; South/Central Delhi.
shortlist.metro_note: Not directly metro-adjacent - nearest stations (INA/Dhaula Kuan) are a real auto ride away, not a walk. Model transport honestly.
shortlist.coords_source: geocoder (OSM/Nominatim), venue-level match on 'PVR Priya' - cross-checked against Vasant Vihar locality, plausible.

shortlist.name: PVR Select City Walk
shortlist.editorial_verdict: Reputed to match Priya's laser IMAX, at a mall with a metro station in walking distance.
shortlist.selection_reason: Second Full Epic anchor; also serves Worth Every Rupee via its classic/GOLD tiers in the same building.
shortlist.metro_note: Malviya Nagar station, short walk - confirm exact distance in data build.
shortlist.coords_source: geocoder (OSM/Nominatim), venue-level match on 'Select Citywalk' - cross-checked against Saket locality, plausible.

shortlist.name: PVR Superplex, Mall of India
shortlist.editorial_verdict: Noida's IMAX option - modern installation, laser status not yet confirmed.
shortlist.selection_reason: Noida anchor. NOT the same venue as PVR Superplex Logix (Sector 32) - see corrections_made_during_curation.
shortlist.showtime_warning: 4DX slots at this venue should carry the skip-4DX editorial note.
shortlist.coords_source: geocoder (OSM/Nominatim), venue-level match on 'DLF Mall Of India' - cross-checked against Sector 18 Noida, plausible.

shortlist.name: PVR Vegas
shortlist.editorial_verdict: West Delhi's IMAX option, paired with a LUXE recliner tier.
shortlist.selection_reason: Dwarka/West Delhi anchor - otherwise unrepresented in the shortlist.
shortlist.showtime_warning: 4DX slots at this venue should carry the skip-4DX editorial note.
shortlist.coords_source: geocoder (OSM/Nominatim), venue-level match on 'Vegas Mall' - cross-checked against Dwarka locality, plausible.

shortlist.name: Pepsi PVR Ambience / Kotak IMAX
shortlist.editorial_verdict: Gurugram's IMAX option - laser status needs a call to the venue before we assert it.
shortlist.selection_reason: Gurugram anchor; validated in the DLF Phase 2 test case as a live intent winner.

coords_verified.source: geocoder, mall-level - venue is within this mall, floor-level precision still needed

shortlist.metro_note: Sikanderpur Metro ~2.7km away - model as an auto/cab leg, NOT a walk (caught in earlier data pass).
shortlist.showtime_warning: 4DX slots at this venue should carry the skip-4DX editorial note.
shortlist.open_item: Confirm this is distinct from 'PVR Director's Cut, Ambience Mall NH8' (id: directors-cut-ambience-gurugram) - same mall, different screen, or duplicate scrape? Needs resolution before ship.

shortlist.name: INOX Coca-Cola IMAX, Paras
shortlist.editorial_verdict: One of Delhi's oldest IMAX installs - historic, but likely not laser; verify before claiming parity with Priya/Saket.
shortlist.selection_reason: South Delhi second IMAX option, different corridor (Nehru Place) than Saket/Vasant Vihar.
shortlist.coords_source: geocoder (OSM/Nominatim), venue-level match on 'Paras Cinema' building - cross-checked against Nehru Place locality, plausible.

shortlist.name: INOX Vishal Mall
shortlist.editorial_verdict: West Delhi's other IMAX option - smaller-mall tier, treat as a value IMAX pick pending verification.
shortlist.selection_reason: West Delhi coverage, complements Vegas Dwarka for that quadrant.
shortlist.coords_source: geocoder (OSM/Nominatim), venue-level match on 'Vishal Mall' on 'Vishal Cinema Road' - high confidence despite the geocoder tagging the suburb as Patel Nagar rather than Rajouri Garden (adjacent West Delhi neighborhoods; the road name is named after this exact cinema).

shortlist.name: INOX Insignia, Epicuria
shortlist.editorial_verdict: Boutique recliner screen, same neighborhood as the Paras IMAX - the value alternative if IMAX pricing isn't worth it to you.
shortlist.selection_reason: Worth Every Rupee candidate paired geographically with inox-paras-nehru-place.
shortlist.coords_source: geocoder (OSM/Nominatim), exact POI match: 'INOX Insignia Epicuria Cinema' (amenity=cinema) - high confidence.

shortlist.name: Cinepolis DLF Avenue
shortlist.editorial_verdict: Cinepolis's premium format, same mall district as Select Citywalk - a cheaper Saket alternative.
shortlist.selection_reason: Worth Every Rupee candidate for Saket-area users who don't need IMAX.
shortlist.showtime_warning: 4DX slots at this venue should carry the skip-4DX editorial note.
shortlist.coords_source: geocoder (OSM/Nominatim), venue-level match on 'DLF Avenue' mall - cross-checked against Saket locality, plausible.

shortlist.name: Devgn CineX (fmr. NY)
shortlist.editorial_verdict: Laser projection and Atmos sound without IMAX pricing - a strong Gurugram value pick.
shortlist.selection_reason: Second Gurugram option, different sector than Ambience - covers users along the Sohna Road corridor.
shortlist.coords_note: Confirmed real address via web search: Elan Epic, Sector 70, Gurugram, Haryana 122101 (Southern Peripheral Road). Geocoder resolves 'Sector 70, Gurugram' only to a suburb-level centroid (~2km wide bounding box), not building precision - too imprecise to accept as venue coords. Manual pin (Google Maps app) needed, but the address is now confirmed and ready for that lookup.

shortlist.name: Wave Cinemas
shortlist.editorial_verdict: Recliner seating plus laser projection - a comfortable, unpretentious Gurugram option.
shortlist.selection_reason: Third Gurugram data point - locality within Gurugram needs pinning down during data build.
shortlist.coords_note: Geocoder found no match for 'Wave Cinemas'/'Wave Mall' under several Gurugram phrasings. The curated locality field itself is still unresolved ('Gurugram (main)') per selection_reason above, so this needs the locality pinned down before coordinates can be looked up at all.

shortlist.name: PVR Director's Cut
shortlist.editorial_verdict: Boutique small-format screen in the same mall as Noida's IMAX - the intimate alternative.
shortlist.selection_reason: Pairs with mall-of-india-noida for Noida coverage; Worth Every Rupee / Easy Evening candidate.
shortlist.coords_source: Same building as mall-of-india-noida (DLF Mall of India, Sector 18, Noida) - geocoder venue-level match, plausible.

shortlist.name: INOX Pacific Mall
shortlist.editorial_verdict: Southeast Delhi's premium option - fills a real geographic gap toward Okhla/Jasola.
shortlist.selection_reason: Geographic coverage - no other shortlisted venue serves this corridor.
shortlist.coords_note: Geocoder repeatedly returned a DIFFERENT 'Pacific Mall' (Anand Vihar/Shahdara, East Delhi - ~15km from Jasola; confirmed this is a real, distinct property when a later geocode attempt for an unrelated venue independently surfaced a road called 'Pacific Mall Pathway' near NSP metro, in North-West Delhi). Delhi genuinely has multiple malls branded 'Pacific Mall' - this is now doubly confirmed, not just suspected. Confirmed real address for THIS (Jasola) one via web search: Pacific Mall, near Jasola Apollo Metro / Sarita Vihar Metro Station, Mathura Road, New Delhi 110025 (2 min walk from Sarita Vihar). Geocoding that address still returns a nearby commercial building, not the mall itself - too imprecise to accept. Manual pin needed, address is confirmed and ready for that lookup.

shortlist.name: PVR Cinemagic
shortlist.editorial_verdict: A genuinely new 6-screen luxury multiplex (not a dated one) - confirmed 4K laser projection and Dolby 7.1 across the house, 2 Luxe screens plus 1 PXL large-format.
shortlist.selection_reason: Geographic coverage - otherwise North-West Delhi (Pitampura/Rohini) has no shortlisted venue. Score bumped 65->68 on confirmed laser projection (was assumed, now sourced).
shortlist.coords_note: Confirmed real address via web search (Business Upturn coverage of the multiplex opening): 3rd Floor, One Unity Elegante Mall, NSP (Netaji Subhash Place), Pitampura, New Delhi 110034. Geocoder returned a DIFFERENT 'Unity One Mall' (Vikaspuri, West Delhi) for the bare name, and resolved 'Netaji Subhash Place, Delhi' to the NSP metro station itself (Shalimar Bagh side, ~110035) rather than this mall - close but not the building. Manual pin needed, address is confirmed and ready for that lookup.

shortlist.name: New US Cinemas
shortlist.editorial_verdict: The one recognizable option in Ghaziabad - honest mid-tier pick, not a showpiece.
shortlist.selection_reason: Included below the usual Tier B cutoff deliberately: Ghaziabad localities need SOME answer, and this is the best available. Faridabad has no equivalent and is a known gap (see known_coverage_gaps).
shortlist.coords_source: geocoder (OSM/Nominatim), exact POI match on 'Aditya Mall, Ghaziabad' - plausible.

considered_but_cut: QLA Cinemas (Dremz Mall, Gurugram) - redundant with Devgn CineX/Wave for Gurugram value tier
INOX World Mark (Sector 65, Gurugram) - same reason
Cinepolis Airia Mall (Sohna Road, Gurugram) - same reason, three Gurugram value picks felt like enough
PVR Superplex Logix (Sector 32, Noida) - untagged/Tier E, and Mall of India already anchors Noida

format_scores._meta: Experience score (0-100, VENUE-SCORING.md rubric tiers) for a show whose format is NOT the venue's flagship_format. Flagship shows use the venue's own curated `score`. IMAX 2D appears here only as a safety net (74 = lowest A-tier) for the impossible case of an IMAX show at a non-IMAX-flagship venue. Unknown formats fall back to format_score_default (E tier).

format_warnings.4DX-2D: Skip the 4DX show for this one — the motion seats fight Nolan's camerawork.
